Container.Name: zabbix-web-apache-pgsql
Container.Overview:
Zabbix web-interface based on Apache2 web server with PostgreSQL database support.
Zabbix web interface is a part of Zabbix software. It is used to manage resources under monitoring and view monitoring statistics.

Config.Name: Database Server
Config.Description: IP or DNS name of PostgreSQL server

Config.Name: Database Port
Config.Description: Port of PostgreSQL server. By default, value is '5432'.

Config.Name: Database Name
Config.Description: Zabbix database name. By default, value is zabbix

Config.Name: Zabbix Server Host
Config.Description: IP or DNS name of Zabbix server. By default, value is zabbix-server.

Config.Name: PHP Timezone
Config.Description: The variable is timezone in PHP format. Full list of supported timezones are available on php.net

Config.Name: Zabbix Server Name
Config.Description: The variable is visible Zabbix installation name in right or left top corner of the web interface.
